message:
feat(bz2): Replace stubs with libbz2 C library calls

Like CPython, link against system libbz2 via bzlib.h:
- Added @cImport for bzlib.h (same as CPython's Modules/_bz2module.c)
- Implemented compress() using BZ2_bzBuffToBuffCompress()
- Implemented decompress() using BZ2_bzBuffToBuffDecompress()
- Implemented BZ2File.read() with real decompression
- Implemented BZ2File.close() with real compression

Removed all 12 error.Bz2NotImplemented stubs.

System libraries found:
- libbz2: 1.0.8 (via pkg-config)

Next: Update build.zig to add -lbz2 linker flag.
